commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And a highway shall be there, and a way, and it shall be called The way of holiness; the unclean shall not pass over it; but it shall be for others: the wayfaring men, though fools, shall not err therein. Way, leading to Jerusalem. Idolaters, shall not be there, chap. This was only verified (Calmet) in the Catholic Church, where, though some wicked may be found, the truth still prevails; and holiness can be obtained no where else. (Haydock) This Church is unspotted, Ephesians v. (Calmet) Fools. The most simple may learn what is necessary for salvation, (Menochius) which will never be done by consulting Scripture alone.
